title: Claude Code SKILL.md Frontmatter
description: Schema for the YAML frontmatter at the top of every SKILL.md file. Only `name` is strictly required, but `description` is strongly recommended and should follow the third-person trigger-phrase convention.

name.description: Skill identifier in kebab-case. Must match the leaf directory name (e.g., skills/my-skill/SKILL.md → name: my-skill).

description.description: Trigger description. SHOULD start with "This skill should be used when the user asks to ..." and list concrete trigger phrases in quotes. Vague descriptions undertrigger.
